author: shendongchun
description: Connect to Memos and manage memo records in a card view. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: shendongchun
manifest.description: Connect to Memos and manage memo records in a card view.
manifest.name: Memos Card View

name: Memos Card View

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Build command

```bash
npm ci
npm run build
```

## Changes

Changes since `0.1.1`:

- 1.0.0 (5855648)
- - 移除了 child_process / fs / os / path 相关代码。   - 删除了 headless/System Chrome fallback 和 System Chrome path 设置项。   - 网页剪藏现在只走 requestUrl + Obsidian/Electron hidden BrowserWindow。   - 删除了 document.execCommand(copy) 和隐藏 textarea fallback。   - 剪贴板只保留用户点击触发的 navigator.clipboard.writeText()，并在设置说明和 README 里明确说明用途。   - 顺带保留了之前 browser-extension/styles.css 的 6 位 hex 修复。 (d707baf)

## Assets

- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Build command

```bash
npm ci
npm run build
```

## Changes

Initial release:

- 0.1.1 (ce6eb94)
- remove AGETNS files (8bee8bf)
- chore: add Obsidian release automation (595d21b)
- chore: use placeholder memos default url (b84ad5f)
- docs: clarify release and desktop requirements (1fd93e5)
- chore: add release packaging workflow (62b8af1)
- feat: add browser extension icons (83d29b0)
- fix: make browser page extraction self-contained (16bccdd)
- feat: add browser extension clip bridge (d187120)
- feat: configure memo publish visibility (a776803)
- feat: add memo context menu copy actions (7d9bbf8)
- fix: try direct web clips before browser fallback (6547e74)
- fix: run chrome web clips headlessly (49f3f87)
- fix: wait for readable chrome web clips (2a96d40)
- feat: use system chrome fallback for web clipping (72fbc10)
- feat: use embedded browser for web clipping (e94a36a)
- fix: support cookies for protected web clips (31901ca)
- feat: let llm choose web clip hero image (96e7ad4)
- feat: render image attachments in cards (161df7b)
- feat: add web clipping with local llm summaries (86ca620)
- feat: add memo preview editor and attachments (39a1e05)
- style: add memos header icon (e6425c3)
- feat: open memos view in main area (594ff31)
- feat: initialize memos card view plugin (d1d71e8)

## Assets

- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css
